results.rendered_html:
adhikṣip 6 P.
1 To insult, abuse, asperse, vilify, traduce, censure; kiṃ māṃ saṃbhṛtadoṣairadhikṣipatha  Ś. 5  heap accusations on me; nṛpatāvadhikṣipati śauriṃ  Śi. 15. 44 ; na me pādarajasā tulya ityadhikṣiptaḥ  M. 1. 
2 To throw or lay upon, bespatter.
3 To superinduce (disease).
4 To surpass.
